title: Ad-spend record (v1) — provider-variant cost field
description: Daily campaign stats from the pull lane. The cost field is provider-variant TODAY (google: cost_micros, meta: spend) and is normalized to minor units by ClickHouse mv_ad_spend; a fully canonical AdSpendRecord (spend_minor) is the v2 upgrade. mv keys on (brand_id, provider, campaign_id, date).

cost_micros.description: google only — micros of the account currency

spend.description: meta only — major units, decimal string
